mapper.insert: insert into comment (content, create_time, status, user_id, commented_user_id, comment_level, order_id,update_time) values (#{content}, #{createTime}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{commentedUserId}, #{commentLevel}, #{orderId},#{updateTime})
mapper.select: select c.id, c.content, c.create_time as createTime, c.status, c.user_id as userId, u.username as username, u.profile_url as profileUrl, c.commented_user_id as commentedUserId, cu.username as commentedUsername, c.comment_level as commentLevel, c.order_id as orderId from comment c left join user u on c.user_id = u.id left join user cu on c.commented_user_id = cu.id where c.id = #{id}

select c.id, c.content, c.create_time as createTime, c.status, c.user_id as userId, u.username as username, u.profile_url as profileUrl, c.commented_user_id as commentedUserId, cu.username as commentedUsername, c.comment_level as commentLevel, c.order_id as orderId from comment c left join user u on c.user_id = u.id left join user cu on c.commented_user_id = cu.id where c.commented_user_id = #{commentedUserId} and c.status = 1 order by c.create_time desc

select c.id, c.content, c.create_time as createTime, c.status, c.user_id as userId, u.username as username, u.profile_url as profileUrl, c.commented_user_id as commentedUserId, cu.username as commentedUsername, c.comment_level as commentLevel, c.order_id as orderId from comment c left join user u on c.user_id = u.id left join user cu on c.commented_user_id = cu.id where c.user_id = #{userId} and c.status = 1 order by c.create_time desc
